description: European digital health platform offering video consultations, digital triage, and asynchronous care. One of largest telemedicine providers in Europe. Operates across Sweden, Norway, Germany, UK, and France under Kry and Livi brands.
business_model: B2C/B2B - Telemedicine to patients and employers
key_investors: Index Ventures, Creandum, Accel, General Atlantic
competitive_advantage: European market leader, proprietary tech stack, integrated care model

varden_fit.rationale: Major European telemedicine competitor - potential threat in occupational health
